overview.description: The SEI DBi Multi-Strategy Alternative ETF (QALT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in multi-strategy alternatives. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation by mirroring the behavior of hedge fund strategies across global equity, fixed income, and currency markets. Investments include futures, swaps, forwards, and ETFs. QALT was launched on Aug 25, 2025 and is issued by SEI.
